data.name: label2.Text
data.value: Decades after the initial outbreak of the Rage Virus, the world has settled into a fragile, haunting new reality. Directed by Academy Award winner Danny Boyle and written by Alex Garland, this long-awaited sequel explores a landscape where the infected have evolved and human survivors have built walled-off civilizations that are beginning to crumble from within. When a new strain of the virus threatens to breach the final strongholds, a group of specialists must journey across the desolate British countryside to find a rumored cure. Cillian Murphy returns to the franchise that redefined the zombie genre in this gritty, high-stakes survival epic.
